title: ‘I don’t expect forgiveness’: What DC shooter’s manifesto reveals about gala attack
summary_full: A chilling manifesto from White House Correspondents' Dinner attacker Cole Allen revealed his motives and meticulous plan.  He apologized for the chaos but deemed his actions a 'duty' against perceived 'crimes' by US leadership. Allen detailed targeting administration officials, prioritizing them by rank, while explicitly sparing FBI chief Kash Patel. His writings also criticized security lapses at the event.
